import pandas as pd
import os

data_dir = 'data'
files = sorted\(os.listdir\(data_dir\)\)
print\('=== FILES IN DATA FOLDER ==='\)
for    path = os f in files:
.path.join\(data_dir, f\)
    size = os.path.getsize\(path\)
    print\(f'{f}: {size:,} bytes'\)
print\(\)

for f in files:
    path = os.path.join\(data_dir, f\)
    print\(f'=== {f} ==='\)
    if f.endswith\('.csv'\):
        df = pd.read_csv\(path\)
    else:
        df = pd.read_excel\(path\)
    print\(f'Shape: {df.shape[0]} rows x {df.shape[1]} columns'\)
    print\(f'Columns: {list\(df.columns\)}'\)
    print\(f'Dtypes:'\)
    for col in df.columns:
        print\(f'  {col}: {df[col].dtype}'\)
    print\(f'Sample \(first 3 rows\):'\)
    print\(df.head\(3\).to_string\(\)\)
    print\(\)
")

import pandas as pd

data_dir = 'data'
files = sorted\(os.listdir\(data_dir\)\)
print\('=== FILES IN DATA FOLDER ==='\)
for f in files:
    path = os.path.join\(data_dir, f\)
    size = os.path.getsize\(path\)
    print\(f'{f}: {size:,} bytes'\)
print\(\)

for f in files:
    path = os.path.join\(data_dir, f\)
    print\(f'=== {f} ==='\)
    if f.endswith\('.csv'\):
        df = pd.read_csv\(path\)
    else:
        df = pd.read_excel\(path\)
    print\(f'Shape: {df.shape[0]} rows x {df.shape[1]} columns'\)
    print\(f'Columns: {list\(df.columns\)}'\)
    print\(f'Dtypes:'\)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import pandas as pd
import os

data_dir = 'data'
files = sorted\(os.listdir\(data_dir\)\)

for f in files:
    path = os.path.join\(data_dir, f\)
    print\(f'=== {f} ==='\)
    
    # Try different engines
    if f.endswith\('.csv'\):
        df = pd.read_csv\(path, nrows=5\)
        print\(f'Shape: {df.shape}'\)
        print\(f'Columns: {list\(df.columns\)}'\)
        for col in df.columns:
            print\(f'  {col}: {df[col].dtype}'\)
        print\(df.to_string\(\)\)
    else:
        # Try with xlrd engine for .xls
        try:
            df = pd.read_excel\(path, nrows=5, engine='xlrd'\)
            print\(f'Shape: {df.shape}'\)
            print\(f'Columns: {list\(df.columns\)}'\)
            for col in df.columns:
                print\(f'  {col}: {df[col].dtype}'\)
            print\(df.to_string\(\)\)
        except Exception as e:
            print\(f'xlrd failed: {e}'\)
            # Try openpyxl
            try:
                df = pd.read_excel\(path, nrows=5, engine='openpyxl'\)
                print\(f'Shape: {df.shape}'\)
                print\(f'Columns: {list\(df.columns\)}'\)
                for col in df.columns:
                    print\(f'  {col}: {df[col].dtype}'\)
                print\(df.to_string\(\)\)
            except Exception as e2:
                print\(f'openpyxl failed: {e2}'\)
    print\(\)
EOF)

import pandas as pd
import os

data_dir = 'data'

# Read each file as CSV despite .xls extension
print\("=== SALES_MASTER.xls \(actually CSV\) ==="\)
df = pd.read_csv\(f'{data_dir}/SALES_MASTER.xls', nrows=1000\)
print\(f'Shape \(first 1000\): {df.shape}'\)
print\(f'Columns: {list\(df.columns\)}'\)
for col in df.columns:
    print\(f'  {col}: {df[col].dtype}'\)
print\(df.head\(3\).to_string\(\)\)
print\(\)

print\("=== ITEM_MASTER.xls \(actually CSV\) ==="\)
df = pd.read_csv\(f'{data_dir}/ITEM_MASTER.xls', nrows=1000\)
print\(f'Shape \(first 1000\): {df.shape}'\)
print\(f'Columns: {list\(df.columns\)}'\)
for col in df.columns:
    print\(f'  {col}: {df[col].dtype}'\)
print\(df.head\(3\).to_string\(\)\)
print\(\)

print\("=== SOH_MASTER.xls \(actually CSV\) ==="\)
df = pd.read_csv\(f'{data_dir}/SOH_MASTER.xls', nrows=1000\)
print\(f'Shape \(first 1000\): {df.shape}'\)
print\(f'Columns: {list\(df.columns\)}'\)
for col in df.columns:
    print\(f'  {col}: {df[col].dtype}'\)
print\(df.head\(3\).to_string\(\)\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import pandas as pd
import os

data_dir = 'data'

# Get full counts and stats
print\("=== FULL DATA STATS ===\\n"\)

# SALES
print\("--- SALES_MASTER.xls ---"\)
df = pd.read_csv\(f'{data_dir}/SALES_MASTER.xls'\)
print\(f"Total rows: {len\(df\):,}"\)
print\(f"Unique stores: {df['Store_ID'].nunique\(\)}"\)
print\(f"Unique SKUs: {df['SKU'].nunique\(\)}"\)
print\(f"Date range: {df['date'].min\(\)} to {df['date'].max\(\)}"\)
print\(f"Quantity stats: min={df['Quantity'].min\(\)}, max={df['Quantity'].max\(\)}, mean={df['Quantity'].mean\(\):.2f}"\)
print\(\)

# ITEM
print\("--- ITEM_MASTER.xls ---"\)
df = pd.read_csv\(f'{data_dir}/ITEM_MASTER.xls'\)
print\(f"Total rows: {len\(df\):,}"\)
print\(f"Unique SKUs: {df['SKU'].nunique\(\)}"\)
print\(f"Unique Groups: {df['Group '].nunique\(\)}"\)
print\(f"Unique Departments: {df['Department'].nunique\(\)}"\)
print\(f"Unique Classes: {df['Class'].nunique\(\)}"\)
print\(f"Unique Subclasses: {df['Subclass'].nunique\(\)}"\)
print\(f"Seasons: {df['Season'].unique\(\).tolist\(\)}"\)
print\(\)

# SOH
print\("--- SOH_MASTER.xls ---"\)
df = pd.read_csv\(f'{data_dir}/SOH_MASTER.xls'\)
print\(f"Total rows: {len\(df\):,}"\)
print\(f"Unique locations: {df['LOC_ID'].nunique\(\)}"\)
print\(f"Unique SKUs: {df['SKU'].nunique\(\)}"\)
print\(f"Date range: {df['date'].min\(\)} to {df['date'].max\(\)}"\)
print\(f"SOH stats: min={df['SOH'].min\(\)}, max={df['SOH'].max\(\)}, mean={df['SOH'].mean\(\):.2f}"\)
print\(f"Zero stock rows: {\(df['SOH'] == 0\).sum\(\):,} \({\(df['SOH'] == 0\).mean\(\)*100:.1f}%\)"\)
print\(\)

# STORE
print\("--- STORE_MASTER.csv ---"\)
df = pd.read_csv\(f'{data_dir}/STORE_MASTER.csv'\)
print\(f"Total rows: {len\(df\):,}"\)
print\(f"Unique stores: {df['Store Id'].nunique\(\)}"\)
print\(f"Store grades: {df['Store Grade'].unique\(\).tolist\(\)}"\)
print\(f"Store types: {df['Store Type '].unique\(\).tolist\(\)}"\)
print\(f"States: {df['State'].unique\(\).tolist\(\)}"\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import pandas as pd
import os

data_dir = 'data'

# More details on Groups, Departments, Classes
print\("=== ITEM HIERARCHY DETAILS ---\\n"\)

df = pd.read_csv\(f'{data_dir}/ITEM_MASTER.xls'\)
print\("Groups:"\)
print\(df['Group '].value_counts\(\).to_string\(\)\)
print\("\\nDepartments:"\)
print\(df['Department'].value_counts\(\).to_string\(\)\)
print\("\\nClasses:"\)
print\(df['Class'].value_counts\(\).to_string\(\)\)
print\("\\nSubclasses:"\)
print\(df['Subclass'].value_counts\(\).to_string\(\)\)

print\("\\n=== SALES DETAILS ---\\n"\)
df = pd.read_csv\(f'{data_dir}/SALES_MASTER.xls'\)
print\("Stores:"\)
print\(df['Store_ID'].value_counts\(\).head\(10\).to_string\(\)\)
print\(f"\\nTotal unique store-SKU combos: {df.groupby\(['Store_ID', 'SKU']\).ngroups}"\)

# Check markdown column for promotions
print\("\\nMarkdown analysis:"\)
print\(f"Rows with markdown > 0: {\(df['Markdown'] > 0\).sum\(\):,} \({\(df['Markdown'] > 0\).mean\(\)*100:.2f}%\)"\)
print\(f"Markdown values: {df[df['Markdown'] > 0]['Markdown'].unique\(\)[:10]}"\)

print\("\\n=== STORE DETAILS ---\\n"\)
df = pd.read_csv\(f'{data_dir}/STORE_MASTER.csv'\)
print\(df.to_string\(\)\)
EOF)
